title: PacBio Announces Record Preliminary Fourth Quarter and Full Year Revenue Growing 113% and 56%, respectively
text: PacBio reported record Q4 2023 preliminary revenue of $58.4 million, representing 113% year-over-year growth. Instrument revenue was $35.1 million, consumables revenue was $18.9 million, and service and other revenue was $4.4 million. Full-year 2023 preliminary revenue reached $200.5 million, representing 56% year-over-year growth with consumables revenue of $63.4 million. Cash, equivalents, and investments totaled approximately $631 million. Revio systems shipped totaled 173 units as of December 31, 2023, with 44 units shipped in Q4 alone. Sequel IIe systems totaled 532 cumulative units shipped. Consumable pull-through was approximately $385,000 annualized per Revio unit with Revio revenue representing approximately 67% of Q4 consumables revenue. CEO Christian Henry stated 2023 was a landmark year for PacBio. The launch of the Revio system enabled PacBio to reach more customers than ever before and achieve record financial results. The company targets 40-50% compound annual revenue growth through 2026, projecting 2026 revenues exceeding $500 million based on 2022 revenue of $128.3 million.
